nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地排水
nodes.summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 扎巴鹪鹩
nodes.summary: 扎巴鹪鹩（Zapata wren，学名 Ferminia cerverai），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽、稀树草原，主要威胁包括湿地排水。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The Zapata wren (Ferminia cerverai) is a medium-sized grayish-brown bird that lives in dense shrubs of the Zapata Swamp, Cuba

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The Zapata wren's habitat is typically freshwater marsh and lowland savanna with scattered bushes and low trees

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Typical threats are fires in the dry season, drainage of the wetlands, destruction due to agriculture, and predation by introduced mongooses and rats
